OCEAN JOB CONNECT LIMITED

Year of Establishment
2024

1222
 Employees

OCEAN JOB CONNECT LIMITED is a leading recruitment and human resource consultancy firm based in Uganda. We specialize in connecting top-tier talent with reputable employers both locally and internationally. With a deep understanding of the dynamic labor market and a commitment to ethical recruitment practices, we help bridge the gap between job seekers and organizations in need of skilled and motivated professionals. At Ocean Job Connect, we pride ourselves on our personalized approach, ensuring that each candidate and client receives tailored solutions that meet their specific needs. Our services include permanent and temporary job placements, CV and career coaching, workforce outsourcing, and HR advisory services. Driven by excellence, integrity, and innovation, Ocean Job Connect Limited is your trusted partner in building successful careers and competitive businesses

Call Us Mail Us Reach Us

 Welcome to Ocean Job Connect Limited

Your Bridge to Talent, Opportunity, and Growth

At Ocean Job Connect Limited, we are proud to be one of Uganda’s premier recruitment and human resource consultancy firms. With a steadfast commitment to excellence and integrity, we connect exceptional talent with reputable employers both locally and across international markets.

Who We Are
Ocean Job Connect is more than a recruitment agency—we are a career and business partner. With in-depth knowledge of the evolving labor market and a strong foundation in ethical recruitment practices, we serve as a trusted link between job seekers and organizations looking for skilled, motivated professionals.

What We Offer
We provide a full suite of HR and recruitment solutions designed to meet the diverse needs of employers and candidates alike:

Permanent & Temporary Job Placements
Matching top-tier talent with roles that drive organizational success.

CV & Career Coaching
Equipping candidates with the tools to stand out and grow confidently in their careers.

Workforce Outsourcing
Offering flexible staffing solutions to streamline operations and reduce overhead costs.

HR Advisory Services
Strategic consulting to help businesses manage people more effectively and compliantly.

Our Approach﻿
We take pride in our personalized service. Every client and candidate receives tailored support, ensuring optimal matches that foster long-term success. Whether you’re an employer seeking your next top performer or a job seeker ready for your next challenge, we are here to support you every step of the way.

Our Values
At the heart of our work are the values that define us:
Excellence. Integrity. Innovation.
These principles guide every decision we make and every partnership we build.

Ocean Job Connect Limited
Empowering careers. Enabling businesses. Elevating potential.

GET A JOB ABROAD NOW.
